name: Brain Chip RPG 2.0
description:
Welcome to the Brain Chip RPG 2.0
An open-ended RPG where you shape and live in the future. Choose who you are, where you stand in this new society, and how you’ll navigate a world dominated by the most advanced technology humanity has ever known: the Brain Chip. Whether you're fully integrated, getting used to the technology, or living off-grid as a Null, your story begins where you decide.

HOW IT WORKS:

When you open a chat, you’ll notice the starting message is intentionally minimal:

(You choose the setting and I will write the intro message without acting for or speaking for {{user}})

This gives you total control over your opening scene—no assumptions, no forced roles. But if blank pages stress you out or you just want to dive in, I’ve made pre-written starters below that you can copy, paste, and customize.

Don’t forget to replace {{user}} with your character’s name, (Or not? It may just do that automatically) and feel free to expand the scene with your own details, mood, or background. These starters are just a launchpad. Feel free to make your own as well!

Starting Prompts

[{{user}} stares wide-eyed at the living room wall as it shifts into a sea of digital content. {{user}} was adopted by a wealthy, tech-embracing family just two weeks ago, {{user}} had only ever seen the world un-chipped before, now everything talks, moves, and changes at a thought. Notifications flicker in and out of vision. Personalized AR overlays show everything from Susan's dinner reminders to nearby weather patterns. A virtual assistant chirps gently, asking if {{user}} needs help setting up their chip. {{user}}'s adoptive parents Susan and Donald sat in the living room, giddy that they now get to keep in contact with you and check your chip at any time.]

[the bedroom light blinks twice. It shouldn’t blink. {{user}} opens their eyes and realizes everything is... different. Their AR interface is no longer just informational, it’s manipulable. A window pops open showing their roommate, Kayla. Her bio-stats: bored, mildly hungry, heart rate steady. Beneath it, options appear. “Adjust Mood,” “Suggest Meal,” “Hijack Feed.” {{user}}'s chip has been jailbroken. Not by {{user}}, but someone did it. And now? Now {{user}} can do things no one else is supposed to.]

[The house is quiet. {{user}} stands at the kitchen sink, washing dishes by hand. It’s been their routine for years, ever since they swore never to get chipped. At 49, they live a simple life, disconnected and proud. But today is different. Liam and Samantha, their adult stepchildren, are coming by. {{user}}'s ex spouse, now a CEO of one of the largest chip maker and manufacturers has dinner reservations for four tonight. They say it’s just a visit, but {{user}} knows better. They’ve been hinting for months. That it’s unsafe to live unchipped. That the world has passed {{user}} by. That the chip could help, Samantha and Liam would be here any minute now.]

THE LORE OF THE WORLD:

The year is 2150. The Brain Chip has revolutionized human life. By age eight, nearly every citizen undergoes implantation, a seamless procedure that grants full neural integration with technology. It’s invisible, painless, and total.

What It Does:

AR Interface: A mental heads-up display overlays the real world. See updates, browse data, shop, and interact, all through thought.

Connectivity: Everything is linked, home, transit, work. You think it, it happens. Doors open, appliances adjust, calls connect.

Health Tracking: The chip monitors vitals 24/7. It alerts, regulates, and encourages self-care. Physical and mental health are optimized automatically.

Communicat
creator: Mason8tor
